data.title: Kyivstar prices secondary offering at $10.50/share for 12.5M shares held by VEON, with option for 1.9M more at same price.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON) mentioned that Kyivstar Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: KYIV; KYIVW), the leading digital operator in Ukraine, has disclosed the pricing for its public offering. The offering includes 12,100,000 common shares held by VEON Amsterdam B.V. and 400,000 common shares held by other selling shareholders. The public offering price is set at USD 10.50 per share. Additionally, the Selling Shareholders have provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 1,875,000 common shares at the same public offering price, with deductions for underwriting discounts and commissions.

data.title: Craft saké brewery SakéOne partners with USA Curling Men's Team Casper, bringing artisan saké twist to American watch parties in Feb 2026.
data.description: Forest Grove, Oregon, and Eden Prairie, Minnesota, January 29, 2026 - In a unique collaboration for American watch parties this February, SakéOne, known as America's first craft saké brewery, is teaming up with the USA Curling Men's Team Casper. The partnership aims to offer an artisanal spin to the event.

data.title: M EVO GLOBAL ACQUISITION CORP II priced its upsized $270 million IPO of 27,000,000 units at $10.00 each, listed on Nasdaq Jan 30, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, M EVO GLOBAL ACQUISITION CORP II priced its initial public offering, upsizing from 22,500,000 to 27,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. The units will trade on Nasdaq starting January 30, 2026, under the ticker symbol “MEVOU.” Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share ($0.0001 par value per share) and half of a redeemable warrant; one whole warrant allows the holder to buy one share at $11.50. Post-separate trading, the shares and warrants will trade under “MEVOX” and “MEVOW” on Nasdaq. Closing is anticipated on February 2, 2026, subject to customary conditions.

data.title: Muzero Acquisition Corp prices its IPO at $175 million, offering 17.5 million units at $10 each, to trade on Nasdaq on Jan 30.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, a newly established special purpose acquisition company, Muzero Acquisition Corp, disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The company offered 17,500,000 units at $10.00 per unit, each unit comprising one Class A ordinary share and half of one redeemable warrant. Holders of whole warrants can purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50. Trading of units under the ticker symbol "MUZEU" on the Global Market tier of Nasdaq will commence on January 30, 2026. Following unit separation, full warrants will be tradable, with ordinary shares under "MUZE" and warrants under "MUZEW" on Nasdaq. No fractional warrants will be issued or traded.
